stocks.impact_theory: Broadcom announced expanded deals with Google and Anthropic for AI chips, plus Intel joining Musk's TeraFab project boosts ecosystem. Economic implications: Accelerates AI infrastructure spend amid geopolitical tensions diverting to tech safe havens. Market psychology: FOMO on AI leaders amid oil surge risks. Historical parallels: Similar to 2023 AI boom post-ChatGPT. Analogies: Like fueling a rocket (AI growth) while storm brews (Iran tensions); betting on the engine room during ship turbulence.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Positive news on AI partnerships drives sentiment; X posts show high engagement with bullish calls; web news highlights expansion as key catalyst amid Mag7 focus.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 8-12% upside on AI momentum over next week
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid short due to strong momentum
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Geopolitical escalation hurting semis supply chain; overbought technicals.

stocks.justification: Strong news corroboration from multiple sources, high X sentiment, historical AI patterns reliable.

stocks.impact_theory: Intel joins Elon Musk's TeraFab project for advanced chips. Implications: Revives turnaround narrative, potential revenue from xAI/Tesla ecosystem. Psychology: Relief rally from underdog story. Parallels: AMD's recovery in 2020s. Analogies: Joining the Musk convoy like hitching to a hyperloop; phoenix rising from chip wars ashes.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Musk association boosts credibility; X buzz positive with mentions of collaboration; news snippets confirm partnership expansion.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long targeting 10% gain if project details emerge
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if delays announced, potential 5% drop
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Execution risks on new project, competition from TSMC.

stocks.justification: Promising but early stage news, sentiment positive but volume dependent.

stocks.impact_theory: Cramer recommends holding semi giant amid market breather. Implications: Validates AI capex sustainability despite inflation fears. Psychology: Institutional buying signal. Parallels: NVDA surges post-2023 splits. Analogies: Anchor in stormy seas (geopolitics); king of the AI hill unchallenged.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Cramer endorsement + semi sector strength; X sentiment highly positive on NVDA calls.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for steady 5-8% on rotation to tech
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Bubble burst if Q2 earnings miss; macro slowdown.

stocks.justification: NVDA's track record, broad coverage, strong sentiment.

stocks.impact_theory: Key levels to watch amid Iran tensions impacting EV sentiment. Implications: Robotaxi hype vs energy costs up. Psychology: Volatile Elon-driven swings. Parallels: 2024 delivery beats. Analogies: Rollercoaster in a thunderstorm; EV rocket dodging oil missiles.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Mixed X posts on levels, positive on Musk ecosystem; news focuses on trading interest.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Geopolitical oil spike hurts margins; regulatory news.

stocks.justification: High volatility, sentiment split but tilted positive.

stocks.impact_theory: Housing stocks slide on inflation fears pre-Fed. Implications: Higher rates crush affordability. Psychology: Risk-off to defensives. Parallels: 2022 housing downturn. Analogies: Building castles on sand (rising rates); popping the homebuyer balloon.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Top S&P loser; X negative on housing amid inflation; news confirms sector weakness.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Avoid or wait for dip buy at $110

stocks.justification: Clear macro headwinds, consistent with historical rate sensitivity.
